Container.Name: bricoprohq
Container.Overview: Bricopro HQ — single-container Next.js and FastAPI app with SQLite persistence.
Container.ExtraParams: --restart=unless-stopped --health-cmd="python -c 'import urllib.request,sys; sys.exit(0) if urllib.request.urlopen(\"http://127.0.0.1:8000/health\", timeout=3).status == 200 else sys.exit(1)'" --health-interval=10s --health-timeout=5s --health-retries=12 --health-start-period=30s

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for SQLite database and uploaded logos. Must survive container updates.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Random secret for JWT signing. Generate: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Login email for the admin account created on first startup.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Login password used when creating the first admin account. Change this before first startup.

Config.Name: App Base URL
Config.Description: Public base URL used for OAuth callback URLs.
